title: ageratina glischra
intro: Ageratina glischra, also known as White Cloud or Cloud Plant, is a flowering plant native to the mountainous regions of Central and South America. It is a member of the mint family and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and relieving respiratory issues, as well as aiding in digestion and reducing stress. Ageratina glischra can be prepared as a tea or infusion, or used in herbal supplements, to harness its medicinal and therapeutic properties.
